description: A multiplayer turn-based tactical RPG featuring a highly modular combat engine and scalable hero ability systems. Engineered core gameplay mechanics for grid-based strategy encounters, dynamic inventory management, and integrated backend services for PvP arena matchmaking and persistent player progression.
name: Forest Knight
highlights: Rebuilt the multiplayer architecture using Unity and Photon for scalability and stability, cutting server costs by over 70%.
Overhauled core gameplay systems, reducing lag, lowering memory usage, and optimizing build size for faster mobile downloads.
Developed a campaign progression system enabling tracking of 1,000+ custom events and actions, including unlocking achievements.
